professional.title: Digital Twin
professional.description: An AI digital twin trained on my professional experience, projects, and technical expertise in backend development, distributed systems, and cloud engineering.

professional.title: T3 Chat Clone
professional.description: A modern, full-stack AI chatbot built with Next.js 15 and Google's Gemini AI model. Supports real-time chat, authentication with Better-auth, conversation history, and usage tracking.

professional.title: Chat-PDF
professional.description: A full-stack web application enabling users to interact with PDFs using a RAG pipeline powered by OpenAI’s GPT-4o-mini for intelligent document querying, integrated with Stripe for payment processing and subscription management.

professional.title: Orpheus
professional.description: An iOS mobile app that retrieves song metadata from the Spotify API and downloads audio streams from YouTube, converting them into .m4a files for offline playback. Includes secure authentication workflows.

professional.title: Passkeys Implementation
professional.description: A passkey-based authentication system built with Next.js, Better-auth, and Resend for passwordless login workflows.

academic.title: Network Intrusion Detection
academic.description: Developed a multilayer perceptron model to classify various types of network attacks for cybersecurity applications.

academic.title: Fake Job Postings Prediction
academic.description: Built LSTM and neural network models to predict fraudulent job postings using natural language patterns and metadata.

academic.title: Traffic Signal Control
academic.description: Simulated urban traffic and applied the A3C reinforcement learning algorithm in SUMO to optimize signal switching and reduce congestion.

academic.title: Recommender Systems
academic.description: Developed movie, book, and PC part recommenders using content-based and collaborative filtering techniques.

academic.title: Face Recognition
academic.description: Implemented a deep learning-based face recognition system using OpenCV and CNNs for identity verification.

academic.title: CoinAge
academic.description: Developed a web application displaying real-time stock market data using Apache Kafka and Alpha Vantage API.

academic.title: Weather Prediction Model
academic.description: Built a fully connected neural network to predict humidity and temperature using historical weather data from Delhi.

academic.title: Self-driving RC Car App
academic.description: Developed an Android app that collects GPS and camera data from a phone and transmits it to Google Cloud Storage for processing.

academic.title: Halite II Programming Challenge
academic.description: Created a game bot that ranked in the top 20% globally (791/5832) by optimizing real-time strategic decisions.
